rationale: Swift-specific workaround for libmongoc URI option validation bug; internal validation improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Adding BSON spec test case per DRIVERS-1319; test infrastructure update, not a driver behavior fix.
Swift API overload naming conflict breaks type inference; Swift-language-specific API ergonomics issue, no spec involvement.
BSONEncoder crash on top-level arrays; internal encoder bug, not a violation of a specific BSON spec rule.
Change stream spec requires ns field to be optional for invalidate events; driver made it non-optional causing DecodingError.
Swift deinit/memory leak for mongoc_uri_t on throw; Swift runtime quirk, no spec rule violated.
Cursor iteration loops infinitely after error; cursor error-propagation behavior, no specific spec rule clearly contradicted.
BSON corpus test parse-error cases not throwing errors in Decimal128 initializer; direct BSON spec nonconformance.
Cursor leaked after DecodingError in findOne; resource leak implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Renaming swift-bson module target to avoid naming conflict; packaging/API ergonomics issue with no spec involvement.
Missing BSONTimestamp Int initializer in swift-bson library split; API completeness during library refactor, not a spec deviation.
Dependency upgrade to libmongoc 1.17; build/packaging task with no driver behavior change.
Retryable writes spec updated to include ExceededTimeLimit, LockTimeout, ClientDisconnect; driver needed to conform via DRIVERS-651.
Reducing default keepalive time for Azure compatibility; operational/networking tuning with no spec rule contradicted.
Spec clarified RetryableWriteError label must not be added to writes within transactions; driver needed to conform.
Performance optimization: skip event creation when no handlers registered; no spec rule violated, purely internal.
Internal performance improvement for _id prepending in BSON library; no spec behavior change.
BSON extended JSON spec requires $uuid parsing for subtype 4 binary; driver lacked this support per DRIVERS-848.
New EventLoopBoundMongoClient type for async framework; API addition with no spec conformance issue.
Performance improvements for extended JSON parsing; no behavior change, purely performance tuning.
BSONDecoder performance improvement; no behavior change, purely performance tuning.
Adding spec tests for invalid relaxed UUIDs per DRIVERS-1526; test infrastructure update, not a driver fix.
Performance improvements for bulk insertion; no behavior change, purely performance tuning.
Blocking DNS lookup in MongoClient initializer stalls event loop; implementation/async issue, not a spec violation.
equalsIgnoreKeyOrder inconsistently handles arrays vs subdocuments; internal test utility bug, not a BSON spec violation.
Rename enum to ExtendedJSONFormat per spec naming; minor API alignment, Improvement type, no wrong behavior to fix.
BSONDocument conformance to Vapor's Content protocol; framework integration, no spec area involved.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1506; adding truncatedArrays field support to change stream event types per spec update.
Change streams spec defines resume logic; driver incorrectly assumes getMore success after aggregate means resumable.
Extended JSON v1 (legacy) parsing accidentally omitted in SwiftBSON 3.0; regression during library refactor, not a spec nonconformance.
BSON spec requires Date as Int64 ms since epoch; driver crashes on out-of-range Double->Int64 conversion, violating spec requirement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1504; updating versioned API transaction-handling spec test file, not fixing driver behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1505; fixing test failure for $listLocalSessions not supported in API version 1.
CRUD spec updated to use $collStats agg stage instead of count command for estimatedDocumentCount; issue split DRIVERS-1437.
Spec defines error handling for writeErrors and writeConcernError on Mongos; issue split DRIVERS-1376 indicates spec-driven behavior change.
SDAM spec updated: drivers must not inspect error messages for 'not master'/'node is recovering'; issue split DRIVERS-1152.
Rotating Atlas dev testing credentials; CI/infrastructure task with no spec or driver behavior involvement.
Spec requires using 'hello' command when Stable API version declared; issue split DRIVERS-1633 confirms spec conformance work.
Stable API spec requires passing API options to getMore and transaction-continuing commands; issue split DRIVERS-1720.
Spec updated to remove slaveOK from URI parsing; issue split DRIVERS-1738 indicates driver must conform to spec change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1130; converting CRUD v2 spec tests to unified test format, not fixing driver behavior.
Command monitoring spec requires sensitive command body redaction; driver published auth data in events. CVE-2021-32050, multiple drivers affected.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1653; adding spec test for sensitive command monitoring event redaction, not fixing driver behavior.
Spec requires using 'hello' command for monitoring if server supports it; issue split DRIVERS-1750 confirms spec conformance.
Bumping maxWireVersion constant for MongoDB 5.0 support; version constant update, Improvement type, not a spec nonconformance.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1840; ensuring tests don't rely on deprecated wire protocol ops, test infrastructure update.
Disabling code coverage on Travis CI; CI infrastructure change with no driver behavior or spec involvement.
BSON/CRUD spec addressed field names with dots and dollars; issue split DRIVERS-1237 and DRIVERS-1828 confirm spec conformance work.
Documentation examples for Stable API connection; docs task with no driver behavior change.
Command monitoring spec requires optional serviceId in events when in load balanced mode; driver needed to expose this field.
